xPosts.content: I've been a bit quiet on X recently. The past year has been a transformational experience.

xPosts.content: We are living in a timeline where a non-US company is keeping the original mission of OpenAI alive - truly

interestSummary: Jim Fan is focused on the evolution of AI training paradigms and reflects on the shifting landscape of major AI organizations, noting the significant role of non-US companies.
